---
name: Issue
about: Bug report, documentation improvement, or policy-sensitive change
---

## Type

- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Documentation / schema improvement
- [ ] Policy-sensitive change _(touches IFPA rules, official policy, or ranking/eligibility definitions)_

## Description

<!-- What is wrong, missing, or being proposed? Reference the specific file or area. -->

## Details

<!-- For bugs: steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behaviour, environment.
     For docs/schema: what should change and why.
     For policy: rationale, affected rules or data definitions, IFPA Board status. -->

## IFPA Board status _(policy-sensitive changes only)_

- [ ] Not yet raised with IFPA
- [ ] Raised with IFPA — awaiting Board decision
- [ ] IFPA Board approved — reference: <!-- e.g. Board resolution 2025-MM-DD -->

> ⚠️ Policy-sensitive changes will be labelled `status: pending-ifpa-board`
> and cannot be closed until IFPA Board approval is confirmed.
> See [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md).
